title: Snow Removal Subscription Service
description: The City is pleased to announce a snow removal subscription service designed to assist residents with the removal of snow windrows left in front of driveways following plowing operations.

title: Spring Clean-Up April 17-18 at Restricted Use Site
description: The Spearfish Restricted Use Site (RUS), located at 910 Camp Comfort Road, will be waiving fees for residents of the City of Spearfish and Lawrence County on Friday, April 17th through Saturday, April 18th. The RUS will be open from 7:30 AM to 4 PM.

title: Annual cleanup day April 1 at Rose Hill Cemetery
description: The annual cleanup day at Rose Hill Cemetery is Wednesday, April 1, when cemetery staff will be picking up decorations around the monuments in preparation for the summer.

title: Pavement Condition Data Collection Begins March 30, 2026
description: March 30, 2026, Infrastructure Management Services (IMS) will begin collecting data on City roads. A vehicle pulling a small trailer will be slowly travelling up and down City streets mostly between 6 p.m. and 6 a.m. testing the pavement condition.

title: Traffic Signal Outage on E. Colorado Blvd and 27th Street on April 8th, 2026
description: A planned power outage will affect the traffic signals at the intersection of E. Colorado Blvd and 27th St. for several hours starting at 9:00 A.M. on April 8, 2026. The intersection will function as an all-way stop until power is restored.

title: East Colorado Boulevard Widening Project to Resume April 22, 2026
description: Construction to continue April 22, 2026 for the Colorado Boulevard Widening Project. Colorado Boulevard through-traffic will be detoured to Interstate 90 between Exits 14 and 17. Private development work may necessitate road closures as soon as April 14.

title: Public Input for Safety Action Plan Projects
description: Thursday, April 23rd from 5:00 -7:00 p.m. the City will be hosting an Open House for the public to weigh in on prioritizing Safety Action Plan projects for federal funding. A brief presentation on the proposed projects will begin at 5:30 p.m.

title: Recap of Joint City Council/Planning Commission meeting on development standards.
description: Joint Planning Commission and City Council meeting held to discuss streamlining development standards in Spearfish.
